preamble: The reduction of the diphthong [ai] into a palatal glide [j] typically occurs in unstressed positions or as part of a general simplification of vowel clusters.

examples.note: Consolidation of diphthongs into glides in hiatus or unstressed syllables.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
